warps.note: Left exit door tile back to Azalea Town
Right exit door tile back to Azalea Town

notes: Row 1 (y=1): bookshelf at x=0,1,2; Celebi statue at x=3; radio at x=5; bookshelf at x=6,7,8; Oak photo at x=9,10
Row 2 (y=2): Kurt normal position (K) at tile(3,2); Kurt workbench position (Q) at tile(14,3) up-facing during ball-making
Row 3 (y=3): Granddaughter position (G) at tile(5,3); Slowpoke (S) at tile(6,3); table/workbench area
Row 7 (y=7): exit mats at tile(3,7) and tile(4,7)
Kurt1 (normal position) appears at tile(3,2) when not making balls
Kurt2 (working position) appears at tile(14,3) during ball crafting
Granddaughter1 appears at tile(5,3) when Kurt is present and not making balls
Granddaughter2 appears at tile(11,4) while Kurt is working
bg_events: Radio at (6,1), Oak Photo at (8,0)+(9,0), Bookshelf at (5,1)+(2,1)+(3,1), Celebi Statue at (4,1)

npcs.name: Kurt (available)
npcs.note: Kurt's normal home position. Visible after Slowpoke Well is cleared and he is not currently making balls. Disappears after GS Ball scene triggers his exit.
npcs.dialogue_summary: First meeting (pre-well cleared): explains Team Rocket situation and rushes to Slowpoke Well. Post-well: honored to make balls, gives Lure Ball. Then accepts Apricorns and explains ball crafting system. Takes 1 real-time day per ball.

npcs.name: Kurt (working)
npcs.note: Kurt's workbench position. Appears when ENGINE_KURT_MAKING_BALLS flag is set. Faces away from player (up). Turns to face player when spoken to then turns back.
npcs.dialogue_summary: While working: asks granddaughter to help, works faster. If bothered again: tells player not to bother him. While checking GS Ball: 'I'm checking it now... Ah-ha! I see!'

npcs.name: Maizie (Granddaughter, free)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Has multiple states: before well cleared (worried about Slowpoke); after well cleared (glad Slowpoke back, tail growing back); when Kurt is away (lonely); after Dad visited (dad works at Silph on Poke Balls); during Apricorn delivery (eager to help). Dialogue changes based on multiple event flags.

npcs.name: Maizie (Granddaughter, helping)
npcs.dialogue_summary: While helping Kurt: excited to help make Balls, asks player to please wait. If GS Ball given: tells player Grandpa is checking a Ball right now.

npcs.name: Slowpoke (pet)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Granddaughter's pet Slowpoke. Says '...Yawn?'. Its tail grew back after Team Rocket incident.

interactables.text: It's a statue of the forest's protector.
interactables.note: Decorative statue of Celebi, guardian of Ilex Forest. Foreshadows Crystal's Celebi event.
Framed photo of a young Professor Oak on the wall

ball_crafting_system.description: Kurt accepts one Apricorn at a time (player selects via SelectApricornForKurt special). After receiving an Apricorn, ENGINE_KURT_MAKING_BALLS flag is set and EVENT_TEMPORARY_UNTIL_MAP_RELOAD_1 tracks the pending delivery. Kurt takes 1 real-time day per ball. Ball is ready when player re-enters after 24 hours.
ball_crafting_system.trigger_condition: EVENT_CLEARED_SLOWPOKE_WELL must be true AND EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS must be false (Kurt is home)
ball_crafting_system.initial_gift: Lure Ball given free on first post-well visit (EVENT_KURT_GAVE_YOU_LURE_BALL tracks this)

gs_ball_special.condition: EVENT_CAN_GIVE_GS_BALL_TO_KURT must be set (received after Whirl Islands event)
gs_ball_special.flow: Player gives GS Ball -> Kurt examines it over 1 day -> When ENGINE_KURT_MAKING_BALLS clears, GS Ball check causes Kurt to rush to Ilex Forest -> setmapscene AZALEA_TOWN SCENE_AZALEATOWN_KURT_RETURNS_GS_BALL -> Celebi event begins

events.description: On first entry, Kurt (at home position) explains Team Rocket situation. EVENT_AZALEA_TOWN_SLOWPOKETAIL_ROCKET is set. Kurt then animates walking out of the house using KurtsHouseKurtExitHouseMovement (or GoAroundPlayer variant if player blocks path). Kurt disappears from map. This is the game's signal for the player to go clear Slowpoke Well.

KurtsHouseKurtCallback fires on MAPCALLBACK_OBJECTS every time the map loads. It checks EVENT_CLEARED_SLOWPOKE_WELL and ENGINE_KURT_MAKING_BALLS to decide which Kurt (Kurt1 or Kurt2) and which Granddaughter (1 or 2) to show/hide. This dynamically controls NPC presence based on game state.

notes: Kurt's House is in the northwest of Azalea Town (warp destination from tile 9,5 in town). It is the only place in Gen II to obtain Apricorn-based custom Poke Balls. The house contains a Celebi statue (foreshadowing the Crystal-exclusive Celebi quest) and a framed photo of a young Professor Oak. Kurt's granddaughter Maizie lives with him along with her pet Slowpoke. The house functions as a multi-state NPC hub: Kurt's position, the granddaughter's position, and their combined dialogue all shift based on event flags tracking Team Rocket, the Slowpoke Well, and the ball-crafting queue. Dimensions from prompt: 8x4 blocks (16x8 tiles).
